value: Thanks for reaching out! I understand how frustrating it is when your iPhone isn't charging properly—especially after leaving it plugged in overnight. The issue you're describing (staying at 74% despite extended charging time) does sound like it could be related to iOS 11. A few things that sometimes help: try a hard reset by holding both the power and home buttons for 10 seconds, check Settings > Battery to see if any apps are draining power unusually fast, or try charging with a different cable and power adapter if you have one available. If those don't resolve it, please let us know and we can explore further options with you.
